modules.name: Emergency Stop Controller
modules.purpose: Emergency stop signal propagation, abort workflow, post-abort evidence capture, recovery with re-authorization
properties: Only one e-stop can be active at a time
All registered servers receive the stop signal
Procedure state is preserved for post-incident analysis

modules.name: Procedure State Machine
modules.purpose: Procedure state machine enforcement with valid transition validation
properties: State history is maintained for audit
IDLE to ACTIVE requires passing through PREPARING

modules.name: Robot Registry
modules.purpose: Robot registration, capability validation, firmware version tracking
properties: Firmware version must match approved list

modules.name: Task Validator
modules.purpose: Task order validation against safety constraints and robot capabilities

modules.name: Safety Gate Service
modules.purpose: Safety gate evaluation before procedure transitions
properties: 5 mandatory gates: Patient Consent, Site Capability, Robot Capability, Protocol Compliance, Human Approval

modules.name: Approval Checkpoint
properties: Concurrent approval from multiple parties required
No single actor can authorize high-risk actions unilaterally

modules.name: Site Verifier
modules.purpose: Site capability verification against conformance requirements
properties: Validates site meets required conformance level

modules.name: Boundary Enforcer
modules.purpose: Execution boundary enforcement for robotic systems

simulationNote: Safety module definitions are derived from the repository specification. No live safety systems are operating.
